assessor_raw: Transformer-based ticket escalation experiment: the design is methodologically rigorous. Operational escalation label from workflow logs is objective and reproducible. 36-month dataset with temporal split mirrors deployment. Feature preprocessing correctly fit on training only with proper handling of agent leakage via aggregate statistics. Equal tuning budget (20 combinations/trials each) ensures fair comparison. PR-AUC is well-justified for rare event prediction. Bootstrap CIs quantify uncertainty. Per-product-line stratification enables confound detection. Scope bounded to same SaaS environment. Verdict: defense_wins.
